bundles.title: Author Workflow Observation Event Contract
bundles.goal: Define the transport-agnostic observation-event spec with a fixed catalog, common envelope, payload schemas, and behavioral guarantees.

tasks.title: Translate decisions D1-D9 into a requirement map for lifecycle, phase, gate, and progress observation events.
Define the common envelope fields, nullability rules, and reference semantics for event, phase, gate, artifact, bundle, and causal context data.
Enumerate the closed 15-event catalog and specify per-event payload schemas with all allowed status and outcome values.
Add scenarios for per-run ordering, at-least-once delivery, bit-identical re-emission, bounded replay, disjointness from surface events, and coupled cause-to-effect ordering.

bundles.title: Bind Run-State Transitions To Observation Events
bundles.goal: Update workflow-run-state so authoritative transitions consistently emit the required observation events without changing snapshot ownership.

tasks.title: Map run-state transitions to the lifecycle and phase observation events they must emit, including explicit 1:N transition-to-event cases.
Add delta requirements that bind transition emission and snapshot consistency to the new observation contract while preserving canonical run-state authority.
State that the run-state CLI remains snapshot-only and carries no transport or history-serving responsibility.

bundles.title: Bind Gate Semantics To Observation Events
bundles.goal: Update workflow-gate-semantics so gate lifecycle changes emit ordered observation events while gate records remain authoritative.

tasks.title: Map gate open, resolve, and reject lifecycle changes to the corresponding observation events and single-terminal-per-gate rules.
Add ordering requirements that gate events are emitted before any phase or lifecycle effects they directly cause.
Reinforce that gate records stay authoritative and observation events are notification-side effects only.

bundles.title: Validate Observation Event Cross-Spec Consistency
bundles.goal: Prove the three spec deltas agree on names, ordering, replay, and transition-to-event pairings and pass change validation.

tasks.title: Cross-check event names, envelope rules, causal context semantics, replay subset, and coupled ordering language across all three delta files.
Verify every completion condition from C-obs-catalog through C-coupled-order is covered by explicit requirements and scenarios.
Run openspec change validation and resolve any schema, naming, or traceability failures until the change passes cleanly.

bundles.title: Prepare Review And Archive Package
bundles.goal: Package the validated spec-only change for review, archive, and downstream consumer announcement.

tasks.title: Prepare review notes summarizing scope, non-goals, authoritative boundaries, and the reasons the contract stays transport-agnostic.
Confirm the archive package includes all three deltas together and documents that no runtime migration or data migration is required.
Draft downstream handoff notes for future transport, publisher, consumer, and spec-consistency follow-up changes.
